title: AXD Tab
description: A specialized TAB plugin for complete player list customization. Features customizable headers and footers, Hex colors, and automatic updates. Easy to use and high-performance.
body:
![Tab preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e02f177937b93cf5a4f8f03f2844f94f01caddff_0.webp)# AXDTab Plugin Description

## What is the plugin?
A TAB plugin that provides complete customization of the player list in Minecraft.

## Main Features:
- Customize header and footer of the list
- Automatic player information updates
- Color and formatting support
- Easy configuration via settings file

## Why use it?
- Improve the appearance of the player list
- Display important information 
- Get a professional interface

## Installation:
1. Place the file in the plugins folder
2. Restart the server
3. Edit config.yml according to your needs

## Commands:
- /axdtab reload - Reload settings
- /axdtab toggle - turn off/on the plugin ( you need left and join the server to see the updates)
- /axdtab info - Plugin information
